keys.restored: Aḥraz n tsarut yekkes-d ✓ Tisurutin ttwasersen deg uselkim
keys.noBackup: Ur yella ara aḥraz yekkesen i tɣawsa-a n umiḍan
keys.missingPublicKey: Aḥraz ur yesɛi ara tasarut tazayt

keySetup.title: Sbadu tisurutin n uselkim-ik
keySetup.description: Aselkim-a ur yesɛi ara tasarut-ik tabaɣant. Kkes-d aḥraz yekkesen s ufrar, neɣ sbadu tasekkirt tamaynut (ad tizdiḍ izen n tura-a).
keySetup.imported: Tasarut tabaɣant ttekka-d ɣer uselkim-a. Tzemreḍ ad tɣeṛḍ izen n zik-a.
keySetup.enterPassword: Sekcem ufrar n umiḍan-ik iwakken ad nḥrez tisurutin-ik s tɣellist.

auth.headline: Tamsenɣurt tabaɣant i kra n yiwen, anda ma tebɣiḍ
auth.description: Tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara, tasuqilt ɣer 100+ tutlayin, izen n tura, akked usiwel s uɣni/dar.

feature.encryption: Tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara s wudem amezwaru
feature.disappearing: Izen n tura d takka n tɣuri

hero.line1: Tamsenɣurt tabaɣant i kra n yiwen, anda ma tebɣiḍ — s
hero.sub: Awi-d uḍḍun ameɣtu n tiliɣri d usenɣur deg umaḍal s Wi-Fi neɣ data. Tzemreḍ ad tesseqdceḍ tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara, izen n tura, akked usiwel s uɣni/dar HD — s yifecka yellan deg usenfar iwakken ad teqqimeḍ teqqneḍ ger tudrin.
hero.freeNote: Asiwel d usenɣur n tiliɣri d ilelliyen. Iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri n AI d tɣuri n tgejdanit ttawin-d asali.

feat.encryption: Tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara, yekka-d yid-s
feat.translate: Kkes-d tɣuri n tutlayin deg yimɣan-ik
feat.disappear: Izen n tura d takka n tɣuri

auth.desktopTip: Deg uselkim? Sken s uẓeṛ n tiliɣri iwakken ad tawiḍ asenfar.
auth.scanHelper: Deg uselkim? Sken s uẓeṛ n tiliɣri iwakken ad tawiḍ asenfar.
auth.subhead: Tamsenɣurt tabaɣant, tsekker, tettwasuqel — s tɣuri tamaynut.
auth.tip: Tamawt: Seqdec amiḍan-ik yiwen deg web d tiliɣri. Izen-ik ad qqimen yemtawanen.
auth.scanHint: Sken iwakken ad tsaderḍ asenfar neɣ ad teldiḍ deg yiminig-ik.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 isekkilen. Seqdec ufrar yellan d amellal, yellan d uslig.
registration.smsConsent: S tɣuri n umiḍan, teqneḍ ad tawiḍ tilɣa n SMS yellan d tamsenɣurt ɣer tɣawsa n Chatforia (am izen seg yimdanen nniḍen). Taggayt n tiliɣri d data tzemreḍ ad tili. Tzemreḍ ad tsefkṛeḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ deg yifecka.

auth.addRecipient: Rnu amerra ukessar iwakken ad tebduḍ…
auth.enterValidRecipient: Sekcem isem n unermid yekksen neɣ uḍḍun n tiliɣri.
auth.sendFailed: Tuccḍa deg tuzna. Wali console iwakken ad tẓerḍ tafat.

home.title: Taggara
home.messagesSubtitle: Sekcem amerra ukessar, sakin azen izen iwakken ad tebduḍ tccerḍit.
home.subheader: Azen izen iwakken ad tebduḍ tccerḍit.
home.addRecipient: Rnu amsawaḍ s ufella i wakken ad tebdu…

refund.title: Tasertit n usefru n udrim
refund.intro: Deg Chatforia, nɛeddu ad nfk axeddim n lqaɛda i yal amdan. Tasertit-agi n usefru n udrim tessekna melmi ara yettwafk usefru.

subscriptions.title: Ijerden (Subscriptions)
subscriptions.body: Ijerden ttusran sdat u ttɣellin s usekles amur n wakud. Tzemreḍ ad tesseḥbes deg yal wakud seg iɣewwaren n umiḍan inek neɣ seg platform iɣef t-tzraḍ.

eligibility.title: Tiwtilin n usefru
eligibility.body: Usefru yezmer ad yettwafk ma yella llan tuccḍiwin am udrim i ttusran sin, tuccḍa deg ubill, neɣ ugur n teknikt i yettḥebsen anekcum ɣer imahilen yettwafkan s udrim. Yal asuter yettwasekcem s tḥeqqiq.

nonRefundable.title: Ur yettusefru ara
nonRefundable.body: S umata, ur nettak ara usefru i wakud ur nettwasexdem ara, iḥricen n ijerden, neɣ ma ur tettseḥbseḍ ara uqbel n usemmed.

thirdParty.title: Tiɣawsiwin n wis kraḍ
thirdParty.body: Ma t-tzraḍ seg platformen n wis kraḍ am Apple App Store, ilaq ad tessutreḍ usefru ɣer-sen srid.

contact.title: Nermes-aɣ
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

login.title: Kemmel ɣer Chatforia
login.googleUnavailable: Anekcum s Google ur yewjid ara
login.appleUnavailable: Anekcum s Apple ur yewjid ara
login.ssoUnavailable: Anekcum s yiwen ur yewjid ara tura. Seqdec username d password.
login.resendVerification: Ales tuzna n imayl n usenqed

about.title: ɣef Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia d platform n tmeslayt amaynut yettwabna i tmeslayt taɣellist u s tutlayin yemgaraden...
about.privacyDesc: Asenked aɣellist d iɣewwaren n tbaḍnit yettwasenfelen sɣur useqdac
about.accessDesc: Tasnalest n tutlayin deg waṭas n tutlayin
about.controlDesc: Imahilen am iznan i yettṛuḥun u read receipts

whyMessaging.title: Acuɣer tesɛa tmeslayt azal meqqren tura
whyMessaging.intro: Platformen n tmeslayt tuɣalin d yiwet seg ifecka iḥerzen deg tudert n wass-a...
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Medden seqdacen apps n tmeslayt yal ass...
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Platformen-agi ttaǧǧan medden ad msettafen deg umaḍal...
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Platformen amaynutin ttaǧǧan asenfar i useqdac...

global.title: Imal n tmeslayt tameḍlant
global.barriersDesc: Medden zemren ad msettafen deg umaḍal...
global.outro: Platformen am Chatforia d aḥric seg usnifel-agi...

index.title: Blog n Chatforia
index.post1: Amek ad tmeslayeḍ s tɣellist deg internet

howItWorks.title: Amek iteddu Chatforia
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia yettwabna akken ad yesshel tmeslayt...

safety.title: Tɣellist d yilugan n tmezdagnut
safety.intro: Chatforia ibɣa ad yefk amkan aɣellist...
safety.respectDesc: Ilaq iseqdacen ad mmeslayen s leqder...

prohibited.illegal: Ifecka ur nelli ara d ileɣal

safety.enforcementDesc: Nezmer ad nɛeddi tigawin ɣef imiḍanen...

chat.selectPrompt: Fren aḍris neɣ taxxamt n tccerḍit iwakken ad tebduḍ ad teccerḍit
chat.emptySubtitle: Azen izen iwakken ad tebduḍ ad teccerḍit.
chat.blockConfirm: Tsewḥel {{name}}? Ur tzemreḍ ara ad tawiḍ izen seg-s.
chat.blockError: Ur nezmir ara ad nẓer anwa asebqaḍ iwakken ad tsewḥel.
chat.blockFailed: Tsewḥel teccuḍ (backend ur yekkes ara yettawi).
chat.unlockToView: Kkes tasarut-ik iwakken ad tẓerḍ izen-a

messageInput.freeLimit: Talast n uɣawas ilelliyen: tuzɣi awtmat ɣer 1 n wass. Tteddu ɣer 1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Talast tafellayt i Premium d 30 n wussan. Tteddu ɣer 30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Aru izen neɣ seddu afaylu iwakken ad tazenḍ.
messageInput.encryptionFailed: Tasekkirt teccuḍ. Izen ur yuzin ara.
messageInput.caption: Tira (d ilelliyen)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Tawlaft tmeqqer aṭas. Ɛreḍ afaylu amecṭuḥ.
errors.unsupportedFile: Anaw n ufaylu ur yekkes ara.
errors.rateLimit: Tuzna n izen tetteddu s tɣuri tamellalt. Ṛẓem.
errors.validation: Tuccḍa n usenqed. Wali izen-ik yerna ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
errors.failedToSend: Tuccḍa deg tuzna. Tzemreḍ ad talseḍ tuzna n tqerrabt i teccuḍ.

contactList.notJoined: Anermid-a ur yekkes ara ɣer Chatforia.
contactList.couldNotStart: Ur nezmir ara ad nebdu tccerḍit. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
contactList.startFailed: Tuccḍa deg ubdu n tccerḍit. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.

contactList.updateAliasFailed: Tuccḍa deg usali n alias. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
contactList.loadFailed: Tuccḍa deg usali n inermiden. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.

contactList.callFailed: Tuccḍa deg ubdu n usiwel. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.

startChatModal.title: Bdu tccerḍit
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Nadi isem, isem n useqdac, neɣ uḍḍun n tiliɣri
startChatModal.noContactsMatch: Ur yella ara inermiden yemtawanen d unadi-ik.

addContactModal.title: Rnu anermid
addContactModal.phoneOrUsername: Uḍḍun n tiliɣri neɣ isem n useqdac
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Sekcem uḍḍun n tiliɣri neɣ isem n useqdac.
addContactModal.cannotAddSelf: Ur tezmireḍ ara ad ternuḍ iman-ik d anermid.

status.captionLabel: D acu i tebɣiḍ ad tili deg tɣuri-ik?
status.filesNote: Ar 5 n yifayluten. 24h tuzɣi s wudem amezwaru.

voicemail.audioAria: Ameskar n uslu n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ
voicemail.transcriptFailed: Tira n tamsenɣurt ur tewjed ara.

randomChat.title: Tccerḍit tarumit
randomChat.subtitle: Mmeslay d yiwen amaynu s tɣawla, neɣ fren ad tmeslayeḍ d Ria.
randomChat.description: Mmeslay s wudem arussin di tazwara. Rnu Friend mbaɛd ma yella yelha.
randomChat.setAge: Sbadu tazwara n leɛmer-ik deg Profile → Age & Random Chat iwakken ad tiliḍ yemtawan d yimdanen.

profile.title: Amaɣnu n useqdac
profile.mustLogin: Ilaq ad tkecmeḍ iwakken ad tẓerḍ iɣewwaṛen.
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Sken aḍris amezwaru d tasuqilt s tama
profile.saveError: Tuccḍa: Ur nezmir ara ad nḥrez iɣewwaṛen
profile.noPrivateKey: Ur yella ara tasarut tabaɣant deg uselkim-a iwakken ad tsekles.
profile.setBackupPassword: Sbadu ufrar iwakken ad tseklesḍ aḥraz-ik:
profile.importFailed: Tuccḍa deg usekles n tsarut (ufrar ur yemtawi ara neɣ afaylu yekkes).
profile.keysRotated: Tasekkirt tamaynut tesbadu yerna tasarut tazayt tsekles.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Tasarut-ik tabaɣant ur tteffɣ ara seg uselkim-a. Sekles-d aḥraz yekkesen s ufrar iwakken ad tseklesḍ ɣef uselkim nniḍen.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Telliḍ deg uɣawas ilelliyen — seqdec iɣewwaṛen n Tafukt/Ayur ukessar. Sali-d iwakken ad teldiḍ ugar n yifecka.
profile.backupTitle: Aḥraz n tsekkirt d usemtawi n yibenkan
profile.backupDesc: Ḥrez tasarut-ik n tsekkirt iwakken ad tseklesḍ izen-ik ɣef uselkim nniḍen s tɣellist.
profile.freePlanCopy: Telliḍ deg uɣawas ilelliyen. Sali-d iwakken ad teldiḍ ugar n yifecka am aḥraz, uḍḍunen nniḍen, d yifecka n tabaɣant.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ur nezmir ara ad neldi asebter n tɣuri. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
profile.followHint: Tamsenɣurin-nsen ad banen deg uɣawas n utteḍfu-ik ma yekka-d s tenneḍda n yimḍeṛṛen (neɣ i yimdanen meṛṛa).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Azen isiwlen d tuzna n tiliɣri ɣer uḍḍun-ik yekksen neɣ imayl. Isiwlen/tuzna n tiliɣri n yeɣer zemren ad sbanen uḍḍun n Chatforia-ik.
profile.forwardSaved: Iɣewwaṛen n usiwel n tiliɣri yekksen
profile.errE164: Sekcem uḍḍun n tiliɣri E.164 amellal (e.g., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Fren yiwen neɣ ugar n taggara (tiliɣri neɣ imayl).
profile.errQuietHours: Sayeḍ n tɣuri ilaq ad yili gar 0 d 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Nḥerzen kan tazwara n taseggit (ur d ara azemz n tlalit-ik). Yettwaseqdec iwakken ad yili usemtawi n Tccerḍit tamaynut amellal.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Seqdec usemtawi s taseggit deg Tccerḍit tamaynut
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Mi ara yekkes, neɣra ad nɣer imdanen n taseggit yemtawanen.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Anwa i tzemreḍ ad tiliḍ tesmtawiḍ?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Imsaganen n 13–17 ad smtawan kan d imsaganen nniḍen n 13–17. Imdanen meqqren ur zmiren ara ad smtawan d imsaganen.
profile.teenMatchingNote: I tɣellist, imiḍanen n taseggit 13–17 zmiren kan ad smtawan d imiḍanen nniḍen n 13–17 deg Tccerḍit tamaynut.
profile.foriaRemember: Sireg Ria ad tket ɣef wayen i tebɣiḍ
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Mi ara yekkes, Ria ad tseqdec tamsenɣurin-ik n Tccerḍit tamaynut (kan yid-k) iwakken ad teqqim tccerḍit tettemtawi. Tzemreḍ ad tsefkṛeḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ.
profile.voicemailAutoDeleteDays: Tuzɣi tawurmit n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ (ussan)
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Eǧǧ-it d ilelliyen iwakken ad yekkes yid-s
profile.voicemailForwardEmail: Azen tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ ɣer imayl
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Imayl iwakken ad tawiḍ tilɣa n tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Yettwaseqdec mi ara tekkes tɣuri n uslu-ik.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Tɣuri n uɣewwaṛ tesaḍḍa s tɣuri
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Tuccḍa deg usali n tɣuri n uɣewwaṛ
profile.voicemailNote: Tamsenɣurin n uɣewwaṛ seg uḍḍunen n Chatforia-ik ad qqimen deg taggayt n Tamsenɣurt n uɣewwaṛ. Tzemreḍ ad tremdeḍ tasuqilt d tuzna deg iɣewwaṛen yellan.
profile.portHint: Tebɣiḍ ad tekkes uḍḍun-ik amiran? Tzemreḍ ad tseklesḍ ɣer Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Awi-d data n tiliɣri i Chatforia mi ara tekkes seg Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Sefrek aɣawas n tiliɣri n Chatforia, uḍḍunen, tuzna, d usekles n uḍḍun.

options.heading: Fren amek ara tesseqdceḍ Chatforia
options.subheading: Tzemreḍ ad tawiḍ uḍḍun amaynu n Chatforia, neɣ tseklesḍ uḍḍun-ik amiran seg uɣawas nniḍen.
options.portNumber: Sekles uḍḍun-ik amiran ɣer Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Sekles uḍḍun-ik amiran
port.subheading: Sali-d uḍḍun-ik amiran seg uɣawas nniḍen ɣer Chatforia. Ḥrez imeslayen ad yemtawi d umiḍan-ik n uɣawas iwakken ur yelli ara aḥraz.
port.phoneNumberLabel: Uḍḍun n tiliɣri iwakken ad tseklesḍ
port.success: Asuter n tsekles yekka-d! Ad k-neɣ-d tilɣa.

status.heading: Addad n tsekles
status.subheading: Ṭṭef addad n yisuturen n tsekles n uḍḍun-ik.
status.loadError: Tuccḍa deg usali n yisuturen n tsekles.
status.none: Ur yella ara armud n tsekles.

wireless.exhausted: Data-ik yekkes. Awi-d akemmus amaynu iwakken ad tkemmleḍ useqdec n data n tiliɣri.

error.load: Tuccḍa deg usali n tɣawsa n twacult.
error.invite: Ur nezmir ara ad nernu annerna. Ḥrez tellaḍ d bab n twacult yerna ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.
error.checkout: Ur nezmir ara ad nebdu tɣuri i uɣawas n Twacult. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen.

billing.myPlanError: Ur nezmir ara ad nsali aɣawas-ik.
billing.freePlanCopy: Telliḍ deg uɣawas ilelliyen. Sali-d iwakken ad teldiḍ ugar n yifecka.
billing.portalError: Ur nezmir ara ad neldi asebter n tɣuri tura.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Tzemreḍ ad tsefrekeḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ amulteɣ-ik deg asebter n tɣuri, neɣ kkes tura ukessar.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Tebɣiḍ ad tkekseḍ aɣawas-ik tura? Ur yezmir ara ad yekkes.
billing.cancelNowError: Ur nezmir ara ad nkekes aɣawas-ik tura. Ɛreḍ tikkelt-nniḍen neɣ seqdec Sefrek tɣuri.

none.title: Ur yella ara tawacult yellan
none.body: Iwakken ad ternuḍ Tawacult n Chatforia d tɣawsa n data yemtawanen, bdu aɣawas n Twacult.

data.heading: Tɣawsa n data yemtawanen
data.caption: Akk imɣanen bḍan tɣawsa-a. Ad k-neɣ-d tamawt mi ara teqqim teqqneḍ ɣer talast.

invite.title: Rnu aɣerbaz amaynu
invite.body: Azen imayl neɣ aserɣal iwakken ad ternuḍ yiwen ɣer tɣawsa n data n twacult-ik.
invite.expiryHint: Aserɣal-a ad yekkes s kra n wussan. Tzemreḍ melmi ad ternuḍ amaynu.

join.title: Kcem ɣer twacult
join.body: Tettwaɣen-d ad tkecmeḍ ɣer Tawacult n Chatforia yerna ad tebḍuḍ tɣawsa n data-nsen.
join.success: Tekkmeḍ ɣer twacult-a. Tura tebḍiḍ tɣawsa n data-nsen.
join.error: Ur nezmir ara ad k-nernu ɣer twacult-a. Annerna yekkes neɣ yekkes.

premium.heading: Zzi ɣer Premium
premium.description: Ldi iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri d tukksa n udellel.

upgrade.title: Sali-d
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Bdu s uɣawas ilelliyen s udellel. Zzi ɣer adellel ilelliyen s Plus, neɣ ldi akk iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri s Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Fren aɣawas n usenfar, rnu akemmus n data i tman-ik, neɣ bḍu data d twacult-ik — meṛṛa seg yiwen n wemḍiq.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Bdu s uɣawas ilelliyen s udellel. Zzi ɣer adellel ilelliyen s Plus, neɣ ldi akk iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri s Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Rnu data n tiliɣri tamensayt iwakken Chatforia ad yekkes mi ara tekkes seg Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Rnu tɣawsa n data yemtawanen i twacult-ik yerna sefrek useqdec n yiwen.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Ldi iɣewwaṛen n tɣuri d tukksa n udellel.

free.title: Ilelliyen
free.desc: Bdu tamsenɣurt s ilelliyen. Yellan d amellal ma telliḍ kan tɛreḍ Chatforia.

features.chat: Tccerḍit tamaynut 1:1 d tgrawt, akked isiwlen s uɣni d tamuɣli
features.media: Bḍu tawlafin, izen n uslu, d timuɣliwin imecṭuḥen
features.ai: Err n AI d tasuqilt tamaynut (useqdec amellal)
features.disappearing: Izen n tura d yifecka n tabaɣant n tizwirt
features.ads: Ilelliyen yid-s s udellel deg usenfar

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Akk iɣewwaṛen n tizwirt, war udellel. Yellan d amellal i tamsenɣurt n yal ass d usiwel.

features.allFree: Akk wayen yellan deg Ilelliyen, war udellel
features.forwarding: Azen isiwlen d tuzna n tiliɣri ɣer uḍḍun-ik amiran
features.history: Tamsenɣurt n izen ɣer 6 n wagguren
features.support: Tallelt tamellalt mi ara yekkes wenneɣ

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (s ayyur)
premiumMonthly.desc: Tamsenɣurt n Chatforia meṛṛa: yifecka n AI, tawlaft, d tallelt tamellalt.

features.themes: Ldi akk tawlafin n yinit n Premium d yifecka n usenfar
features.ai: Yifecka n AI n Premium kan i usali, err n tizwirt, d tizwalin
features.support: Tallelt tamellalt mi ara tebɣiḍ tallelt

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (s aseggas)
premiumAnnual.desc: Ḥrez ugar mi ara tiliḍ s aseggas — akked yifecka n yinit nniḍen, yifecka n AI, d tallelt tamellalt.

features.allPremium: Akk wayen yellan deg Premium s ayyur — akked yifecka n yinit nniḍen
features.annualBilling: Yekka-d s yiwen n wass n useggwas
features.save25: Ḥrez azal n 30% ɣef tɣuri s ayyur
features.bestFor: Yellan d amellal i yimdanen n tɣuri, imdanen n tɣawsa n yeɣer, d imdanen n tiliɣri

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Ḥrez 30% s aseggas — kemmel ɣer unekcum
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Yekka-d s tazwara. Tzemreḍ ad tkekseḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ. Ur yella ara aḥraz nniḍen.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Akk iɣewwaṛen, islan, d yifecka n AI.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Yekka-d s tazwara. Tzemreḍ ad tkekseḍ melmi ma tebɣiḍ. Ur yella ara aḥraz nniḍen.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (akemmus n data n eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Rnu data tamensayt iwakken Chatforia ad yekkes war Wi-Fi. Tɣuri ad temtawi s tamurt-ik d yidrimen.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Fren akemmus n data tamensayt yiwen n tikkelt iwakken Chatforia ad yekkes mi ara telliḍ deg tiliɣri.
mobile.note: Ur nezzenz ara akemmus n data ddaw 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Data n tɣuri tafellayt i useqdec ameqqran
features.throttle: Tɣuri ad tessusem mi ara tili tɣuri tafellayt
features.instant: Tazwara n eSIM s tɣuri tamaynut
features.noContract: Akemmus yiwen n tikkelt, war amulteɣ

disclaimer.devices: Akemmus n data n eSIM yesra ibenk yellan d eSIM d ilelliyen. Tella-d s yibenkan, uɣawas, d tamurt. Tɣuri d tɣuri ad temtawi s tɣawsa.

small.title: Akemmus n tizwirt
small.desc: Yesɛi 3 GB n data n tɣuri tafellayt — yellan d amellal i tamsenɣurt tamellalt d yisiwlen n tikkelt.
small.bestFor: Tura imecṭuḥen, tamsenɣurt tamellalt, d yisiwlen n tikkelt
small.aria: Awi akemmus n eSIM n tizwirt

medium.title: Akemmus n umussu
medium.desc: Yesɛi 5 GB n data n tɣuri tafellayt i tura, tamsenɣurt n yal ass, d yisiwlen n VoIP.
medium.bestFor: Tura n taggayt, isiwlen n VoIP, d yikaramen
medium.aria: Awi akemmus n eSIM n umussu

large.title: Akemmus n tɣuri
large.desc: Yesɛi 10 GB n data n tɣuri tafellayt i tccerḍit tafellayt, isiwlen, d tamuɣli ɣef uɣewwaṛ n Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Tccerḍit tafellayt, isiwlen, tamuɣli, d useqdec n hotspot
large.aria: Awi akemmus n eSIM n useqdac n tɣuri

compare.title: Smenyif akemmus n data n eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Taggayt n data tettemtawi s wamek ara tesseqdceḍ Chatforia (asiwel, tamuɣli, tamedyazt, d yisensan nniḍen ɣef tiliɣri-ik).

family.title: Tawacult n Chatforia (data yemtawanen)
family.subtitle: Bḍu yiwen n ukemmus n data ɣef twacult-ik. Yiwen n ufelluq, ugar n yimiḍanen n Chatforia, tɣuri tamensayt.

small.title: Tawacult tamecṭuḥt
small.desc: Yesɛi 20 GB n data yemtawanen — yellan d amellal i 2–3 n yimdanen n tizwirt.

medium.title: Tawacult tammidant
medium.desc: Yesɛi 40 GB n data yemtawanen — yellan d amellal i 3–5 n yimɣanen n tɣuri.

large.title: Tawacult tameqqrant
large.desc: Yesɛi 80 GB n data yemtawanen — i twacultin i yellan yid-sen yal ass.

feature.shared: Tɣawsa n data yemtawanen i twacult-ik
feature.membersMore: Yellan d amellal i 3–5 n yimɣanen n tɣuri
feature.topUp: Rnu akemmus nniḍen melmi ma tebɣiḍ
feature.fairUse: Yellan s tɣuri n useqdec amellal d talast n tmurt

family.disclaimer: Akemmus n twacult ad yernu neɣ ad yali tɣawsa n data yemtawanen. Tzemreḍ ad ternuḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ imɣanen melmi ma tebɣiḍ.
family.footnote: Akemmus n twacult yebḍa yiwen n ukemmus n data ɣef imiḍanen n Chatforia yemtawanen. Tella-d s tamurt-ik d tɣuri n tmurt.

why.title: Acuɣer imdanen ttbeddilen ɣer Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia yekka-d s uḍḍun ameɣtu n tiliɣri, tasuqilt tamaynut, d ubrid amellal iwakken ad tiliḍ war udellel.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Udellel amecṭuḥ ɣef Ilelliyen, asali amellal ɣer Plus, d yifecka n Premium ur yellan ara deg TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Asenfar amaynu, tɣawsa tamensayt, d tasuqilt yellan deg usenfar deg uɣewwaṛ n usiwel n zik.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs tamsenɣurin n tccerḍit
messengers.body: Azen ɣer uḍḍunen n tiliɣri amiran — mačči kan ɣer yimdanen n usenfar — s AI d waddad yellan. Yellan d amellal ma tebɣiḍ ad tkecmeḍ seg TextFree neɣ TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Tamsenɣurt tettusbadu ɣef talɣa n tɣawsa yellan d tuzmint yerna tzemreḍ ad temtawi. Tamsenɣurin nniḍen n tuzna n tiliɣri am TextFree neɣ TextMe ttbanen am TextNow.

free.q: Aɣawas Ilelliyen yellan d ilelliyen s tidett?
free.a: Ih. Aɣawas Ilelliyen yesɛi uḍḍun n Chatforia, usiwel d tamsenɣurt s udellel. Tzemreḍ ad teqqimeḍ ɣef Ilelliyen akk melmi ma tebɣiḍ, neɣ sali-d iwakken ad tkekseḍ udellel d tɣuri nniḍen.

plusPremium.a: Plus yekkes udellel yerna yesɛi tamsenɣurt n izen ɣer ugar — yellan d amellal i tamsenɣurt n yal ass. Premium yerna tawlaft, yifecka n AI i usali d err, d tallelt tamellalt i yimdanen n tɣuri tafellayt.

esim.q: Anda ara yekkes akemmus n data n eSIM?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile yesseqdac tɣuri tamensayt n eSIM. Tella-d s tamurt-ik d ibenk-ik. Ad tẓerḍ iɣewwaṛen yellan deg tazwara deg usenfar.

cancel.q: Tzemreɣ ad kkesɣ neɣ ad beddleɣ iɣewwaṛen melmi ma tebɣiɣ?
cancel.a: Ih. Tzemreḍ ad tsefrekeḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ amulteɣ-ik seg asebter n tɣuri deg usenfar. Ibeddilen ad qqimen ɣef taggara n taggayt n tɣuri tamirant.

family.q: Amek ara yekkes akemmus n Twacult?
family.a: Akemmus n Twacult ad yernu tɣawsa n data yemtawanen ɣef ugar n yimiḍanen n Chatforia. Yiwen n umdan ad yefk tafelluqt, yerna tzemreḍ ad ternuḍ neɣ ad tkekseḍ imɣanen d talast i yal aɣerbaz.

gettingStarted.title: Bdu tura
gettingStarted.subtitle: D amaynu ɣer Chatforia? Tamsenɣurt-a tamellalt ad k-ɣer-d akk wayen ilaqen iwakken ad tiliḍ d amellal s kra n tikkelt.

alert.text: Tamsenɣurt-a ad tili d tafellayt mi ara nelhu yifecka imaynuten. Ma yella kra yekkes, aɣ-d tamawt seg

section2.title: 2) Bdu tamsenɣurt
section2.item1: Rnu DM neɣ Taggayt yerna azen izen-ik amezwaru.
section2.item2: Seqdec tasuqilt tamaynut iwakken ad teccerḍeḍ ɣef 100+ tutlayin.
section2.item3: Ɛreḍ izen n tura d takka n tɣuri deg Amaɣnu → Tabaɣant.

section3.title: 3) Kemmel ɣer ugar
section3.item1: Tzemreḍ ad tsaliḍ ɣer aɣawas yellan s tefneft melmi ma tebɣiḍ deg usenfar.
section3.item2: Mi ara tkecmeḍ, tzemreḍ ad tsekelseḍ ibenk nniḍen d aḥraz n tsekkirt seg Iɣewwaṛen deg usenfar.

account.q: Amek ara rnuɣ neɣ ad rekreɣ amiḍan-iw?
account.a: Sader asenfar neɣ seqdec web, sit ɣef “Rnu amiḍan”, rmed imayl/tiliɣri. Iwakken ad tsekelseḍ, seqdec “Tettuḍ ufrar”.

privacy.q: Izen yellan s tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara?
privacy.a: Ih. Izen d isiwlen ttwasekkren seg taggara ɣer taggara s wudem amezwaru. Ala kečč d unermid i tzemreḍ ad tɣeṛḍ.

translate.a: Rmed “Tasuqilt tawurmit” deg Iɣewwaṛen → Tawlaft d Tutlayt. Nesquṭṭu ɣef uselkim mi ara yekkes, neɣ s tɣawsa n API s tɣellist.

contact.a: Awi-aɣ-d ɣer support@chatforia.com. Seddu tamuɣli d lqem n usenfar-ik.

contact.title: Tawila ɣer-neɣ
contact.successMsg: Tanemmirt — tarawt-nneɣ ad k-err s imayl.
contact.errorSend: Ur nezmir ara ad nuzen. Azen s imayl ɣer support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Tabaɣant-a tessufeɣ-d amek ara yekkes Chatforia (“neɣ”, “nekkni”) ad yekkes, ad yesseqdec, d ad yebḍu talɣut mi ara tesseqdceḍ asenfar d tɣawsiwin-nneɣ. Nsbadu Chatforia iwakken ad nesḥel talɣut i nezmer ad t-nawi.

infoWeCollect.title: Talɣut i nekksen
infoWeCollect.account: Talɣut n umiḍan (e.g., imayl/tiliɣri) iwakken ad nernu d ad nḥerzen amiḍan-ik.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Izen yekkesen (izen/isiwlen) yellan s tasekkirt seg taggara ɣer taggara; ur nezmir ara ad t-nɣer.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Talɣut n tɣawsa / useqdec am tizwalin n tuccḍa, anaw n yibenk, neɣ talɣut tamellalt iwakken ad nesnerni tɣuri.

sms.title: Uḍḍunen n tiliɣri d SMS
sms.body: Ma yella ternaḍ uḍḍun n tiliɣri, nesqedcen-t iwakken ad nermed yifecka am usenqed n umiḍan, tilɣa n unekcum, d tuzna n tiliɣri seg useqdac ɣer wayeḍ mi ara yekkes. Nezmer ad nuzen SMS n tɣawsiwin n umiḍan d tɣawsa ɣef Chatforia. Tzemreḍ ad tsefkṛeḍ tilɣa n SMS melmi ma tebɣiḍ s tiririt s ufrar am “STOP” neɣ s ubeddel n yifecka n tilɣa deg usenfar. Ur nezzenz ara uḍḍun-ik neɣ ad t-neseqdec i tɣawsiwin nniḍen n udellel.
sms.addRecipient: Rnu amerra ukessar iwakken ad tebduḍ…

howWeUse.title: Amek ara neseqdec talɣut
howWeUse.provide: Sireg d ad nḥerzen tɣawsa (anekcum, asenqed n spam/abuse).
howWeUse.legal: Ad nili d amellal s tɣuri n tɣawsiwin n tɣellist.

sharing.title: Abḍu
sharing.body: Ur nezzenz ara talɣut n tɣawsiwin. Nezmer ad nebḍu talɣut tamellalt s yimdanen n tɣawsa (e.g., tilɣa n push, analytics) s teqdiṛin n tɣellist.

rights.title: Izerfan-ik
rights.body: S tama n tamurt-ik (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), tzemreḍ ad tessutreḍ ad tẓerḍ, ad tbeddleḍ, ad tkekseḍ, neɣ ad tsefkṛeḍ kra n useqdec. Tawila ɣer: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Aḥraz n talɣut d tɣellist
retention.body: Neḥrez kan wayen ilaqen iwakken ad tili tɣawsa yerna nesqeddec tɣellist n usenfar. Izen n E2E ur yezmir ara ad yekkes seg-neɣ.

children.title: Imsaganen
children.body: Chatforia ur yellan ara i imsaganen ddaw 13 n taseggit (neɣ amek ara yili s tɣuri n tmurt-ik).

changes.title: Ibeddilen
changes.body: Ad nsekles tibeddilen da yerna ad nbeddel azemz n “Tikkelt taneggarut”.

contact.title: Tawila
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: S useqdec n Chatforia teqneḍ ɣer tiwaliwin-a. Ma yella ur teqneḍ ara, ur tesseqdceḍ ara tɣawsa.

accounts.title: Imiḍanen
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Sekcem talɣut amellal yerna ḥrez tisurutin-ik.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Telliḍ d amasay ɣef tɣawsiwin ɣef umiḍan-ik.

acceptableUse.title: Useqdec amellal
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Ur yella ara agdud n tɣawsiwin n tɣellist, abuse, neɣ yellan s uḥerri; ur yella ara spam neɣ useqdec n tɣawsiwin n tɣellist.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Nezmer ad nsewḥel neɣ ad nkekes amiḍan-ik ma yekka-d s teɣzi.

sms.title: Tuzna n SMS
sms.body: Ma yella ternaḍ uḍḍun n tiliɣri, teqneḍ ad tawiḍ SMS n tɣawsiwin n umiḍan d tɣawsa ɣef tɣawsa, am tilɣa n unekcum, tilɣa n tɣellist, d izen yellan d tamsenɣurin i tebduḍ neɣ i tekkiḍ. Ur neseqdec ara SMS i udellel war teqdiṛ-ik. Taggayt n tiliɣri d data tzemreḍ ad tili. Tzemreḍ ad tsefkṛeḍ SMS melmi ma tebɣiḍ s tiririt s ufrar am “STOP” neɣ s ubeddel n yifecka n tilɣa deg usenfar.

yourContent.title: Talɣut-ik
yourContent.body: Telliḍ d bab n talɣut-ik. Ternaḍ-d ɣer-neɣ iẓerf iwakken ad tili tɣawsa (e.g., asali, aḥraz, tasuqilt).

disclaimer.title: Tiwaliwin d tɣellist
disclaimer.body: Tɣawsa tettunefk “am tella” war teɣzi. S tama n tɣellist n tɣuri, Chatforia ur yellan ara d amasay ɣef tuccḍa nniḍen neɣ tuccḍa n taggara.

changes.title: Ibeddilen
changes.body: Nezmer ad nbeddel tiwaliwin-a; useqdec n tɣawsa sdeffir ibeddilen yekka-d s teqdiṛ.

contact.title: Tawila
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ur yella ara ad nzzenz neɣ ad nebḍu talɣut-iw n tɣawsiwin
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ur yezzenz ara talɣut n tɣawsiwin. Imdanen n California zemren ad ssutren s tɣawsa n CPRA s taggalt ukessar.

cookies.title: Iɣewwaṛen n yikukiyen
cookies.body: Chatforia yesseqdec ikukiyen imecṭuḥen (e.g., taggayt, tɣellist). Ur neseqdec ara ikukiyen n udellel nniḍen. Sefrek ikukiyen seg yiminig-ik.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Ur nezmir ara ad nsali addad n uḍḍun n tiliɣri.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Ur yella ara uḍḍun yellan. Fren yiwen s tɣawsa n tɣuri iwakken ad tebduḍ tuzna n tiliɣri.

startChatModal.title: Bdu tccerḍit
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Aru isem, isem n useqdac, uḍḍun n tiliɣri, neɣ imayl…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Nadi s isem n useqdac neɣ uḍḍun n tiliɣri
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Aru isem n useqdac neɣ uḍḍun n tiliɣri yerna sit ɣef Nadi.
startChatModal.pickAtLeastOne: Fren yiwen neɣ ugar n yimerra.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Inekcam n uḍḍun/imayl ad qqimen melmi ma ternuḍ-ten d inermiden.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Tuccḍa deg ubdu n tccerḍit s yimerra yellan.
startChatModal.firstMessageOptional: Izen amezwaru (d ilelliyen maca yellan d amellal)

sounds.freeNotice: Telliḍ deg Ilelliyen — islan n Premium banen maca ttwaḥerzen. Sali-d iwakken ad teldiḍ akk.

aiSettings.title: Iɣewwaṛen n AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Sefrek tasuqilt, err n tizwirt, d tiriritn n ForiaBot.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Sken aḍris amezwaru s tama n tasuqilt
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Azen kra n izen yekkan-d (yellan s tɣellist) ɣer AI iwakken ad d-ibeggen tiriritn tamellalt.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Sfeḍ agdud n tɣuri deg tiriritn n AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Mi ara yekkes, tiriritn n AI ad sbanen awalen yellan s teɣzi
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Rmed tiririt tawurmit mi ara yiliɣ d ameɣlal
aiSettings.saveFailed: Tuccḍa deg uḥraz n yifecka n AI
aiSettings.translateTagged: Ala mi ara yili @translated neɣ yellan s

accessibilitySettings.title: Tallelt n useqdac d tilɣa
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Iɣewwaṛen iwakken ad tesseqdceḍ Chatforia s wudem amellal war aslu.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Tbedda-d s tiddi tamellalt. Sali-d ma tebɣiḍ aḍris ameqqran deg iɣewwaṛen n tallelt n useqdac.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Tilɣa n tɣuri i yizen d yisiwlen
Sken banners d tɣuri n uzwel iwakken ur tettuḍ ara armud.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Tuzzya ɣef izen imaynuten (mi ara yekkes)
Sireg tuzzya n yibenk s tilɣa.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Tafat n ugdil ɣef usiwel yekkan-d
Tafat tamellalt s kra n tikkelt mi ara yekka usiwel.
accessibilitySettings.captionFontSize: Tiddi n tsefsit n tira n tɣuri
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotes: Tira tawurmit n izen n uslu
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Seddu tira ɣer izen n uslu i tawiḍ.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlerts: Tilɣa n tɣuri i yizen d yisiwlen
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Sken banners d tɣuri n uzwel iwakken ur tettuḍ ara armud.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Tuzzya ɣef izen imaynuten (mi ara yekkes)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Sireg tuzzya n yibenk s tilɣa.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Tafat n ugdil ɣef usiwel yekkan-d
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Tafat tamellalt s kra n tikkelt mi ara yekka usiwel.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Ḥrez kan ciphertext ɣef uqeddac. Yekkes AI/Tasuqilt d tazwart n usenqed.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Nadi s alias, isem, isem n useqdac, neɣ uḍḍun n tiliɣri
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Kra n tura tamellalt iwakken ad tebduḍ.
peoplePage.searchByPhoneOrUsername: Nadi s uḍḍun n tiliɣri / isem n useqdac
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Bḍu aserɣal-ik n unnerna iwakken ad tebduḍ tccerḍit s tɣuri tamaynut.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Qqim teqqneḍ deg tiliɣri s Chatforia i iOS d Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tamawt: Izen-ik ad qqimen yemtawanen gar web d tiliɣri.

randomChat.title: Tccerḍit tamaynut
randomChat.description: Mli ɣer yiwen amaynu s tɣuri tamaynut. Ad k-nɣer yerna ad neldi taxxamt n tccerḍit tamensayt. Tccerḍit s tɣellist amezwaru. Rnu d aɣerbaz melmi ma tella tɣawsa amellal.
randomChat.saveGuard: Ala tccerḍitin gar imdanen i zemren ad ttwḥerzen
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Neḥrez kan tazwara n taseggit (ur d ara azemz n tlalit-ik). Yettwaseqdec iwakken ad yili usemtawi n Tccerḍit tamaynut amellal. Iwakken ad tesmtawiḍ d yimdanen (mačči kan RiaBot), sbadu tazwara n taseggit-ik deg Iɣewwaṛen → Taseggit d Tccerḍit tamaynut.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Sbadu tazwara n taseggit-ik deg Amaɣnu → Taseggit d Tccerḍit tamaynut iwakken ad tesmtawiḍ d yimdanen.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Iwakken ad tesmtawiḍ d yimdanen (mačči kan RiaBot), sbadu tazwara n taseggit-ik deg Iɣewwaṛen → Taseggit d Tccerḍit tamaynut.
randomChat.subtitle: Mli ɣer yiwen amaynu s tɣuri tamaynut, neɣ fren ad teccerḍeḍ s Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Sbadu tazwara n taseggit-ik deg Amaɣnu → Taseggit d Tccerḍit tamaynut iwakken ad tesmtawiḍ d yimdanen.
